full_text:
Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur N4tad:Rohan Deshmukh
Dept: IT | Sem: V | Course: HUT5001 - Organizational Behaviour Roll No: IT/ 2023/042
Date: 08/09/2025 | Time: 2:30 PM - 3:30PM | Max Marks: 20 Marks: 05 / 20
Q.1(a) MotoCorp Scenario
(i) OB Model - Autocratic model i think. Managers have authority and
employees follow orders. Strict supervision is there.
(ii) Advantages - job is stable. Disadvantages - employees dont like it.
(iii) Should change to Supportive model maybe.
Q.1(b) Organizational Behaviour
OB is study of people in organizations. It looks at how individuals
behave at work.
Scope - Individual, Group, Organization.
Q.2(a) Maslow's Hierarchy
5 levels are there-
1. Physiological 2. Safety 3. Social 4. Esteem 5. Self-actualisation
(Did not draw pyramid - forgot)
Q.2(b) Components of Attitude
Three components-
Cognitive- thinking part
Affective - feeling part
Behavioral - action part
Q.2(c) Theory X and Theory Y

employees follow orders. Strict supervision is there.

(iii) Should change to Supportive model maybe.
(b) Organizational Behaviour
